booklet.actuallyadditions.chapter.lensMi: The <item>Lens of Hikaru<r> can <imp>create ores<r> out of blocks in its sight. <n>When the laser hits a <item>block of stone<r>, it will convert it into <imp>different overworld ores<r>, whereas a <item>block of netherrack<r> will be converted into <imp>nether ores<r>. <n>Each operation uses <imp><energy> CF<r>, however each operation requires <imp>additional power<r> depending on the rarity of the ore that is generated.
